title: cyrtochilum deburghgraeveanum
intro: Cyrtochilum deburghgraeveanum, also known as the Deburgh's Cyrtochilum, is a species of orchid native to Peru. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cyrtochilum deburghgraeveanum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing. Cyrtochilum deburghgraeveanum is traditionally prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can be used to make teas or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
